artifact.source:
root = Card([table], "Benchmark Results", "50 runs across scenarios, models, and rendering arms", "full")
data = Query("read_csv", {path: "./data/results.csv"}, {rows: [], columns: ["run_id","scenario","model","arm","tokens_in","tokens_out","latency_ms","passed"]})
table = DataTable("results.csv", columns, data.rows, true)
columns = [
  {key: "run_id", label: "run_id"},
  {key: "scenario", label: "scenario"},
  {key: "model", label: "model"},
  {key: "arm", label: "arm"},
  {key: "tokens_in", label: "tokens_in"},
  {key: "tokens_out", label: "tokens_out"},
  {key: "latency_ms", label: "latency_ms"},
  {key: "passed", label: "passed"}
]

toolInput.title: Render a 50-row CSV on disk as a sortable table
toolInput.markup:
root = Card([table], "Benchmark Results", "50 runs across scenarios, models, and rendering arms", "full")
data = Query("read_csv", {path: "./data/results.csv"}, {rows: [], columns: ["run_id","scenario","model","arm","tokens_in","tokens_out","latency_ms","passed"]})
table = DataTable("results.csv", columns, data.rows, true)
columns = [
  {key: "run_id", label: "run_id"},
  {key: "scenario", label: "scenario"},
  {key: "model", label: "model"},
  {key: "arm", label: "arm"},
  {key: "tokens_in", label: "tokens_in"},
  {key: "tokens_out", label: "tokens_out"},
  {key: "latency_ms", label: "latency_ms"},
  {key: "passed", label: "passed"}
]
